# Horn of the Mark ◆

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Artifact. Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Rohan_** hero or Merry. Restricted. 
**Response:** When a character leaves play, if that character shares at least one **_trait_** with the attached hero, exhaust Horn of the Mark to draw 1 card.

---

> *Then Éowyn gave to Merry an ancient horn, small but cunningly wrought all of fair silver with a baldric of green...*
> *-The Return of the King*

**Pack:** [[The City of Ulfast]] #35
